rationale: Pre-conversion corporate name; matches 13-C MRSA usage of entity.name across other corporate forms.

label_verbatim: FIRST: The name of the corporation is changed as follows (the same must satisfy the organic law of the surviving entity)
rationale: Post-conversion entity name. Must comply with the surviving entity's organic-law naming requirements (e.g., LLC suffix per 31 MRSA §1508).

label_verbatim: SECOND: The type of unincorporated entity that the surviving entity will be
rationale: Free-text type of the surviving entity (e.g., 'Limited Liability Company', 'Limited Partnership'). The form's MLLC-6/MLPA-6 attachment hint enumerates the typical destinations.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: If the surviving entity is a filing entity, attached is Exhibit ___ which contains all the provisions required to be set forth in its public organic document...
rationale: Inline exhibit letter for the new entity's required public-organic-document provisions.

label_verbatim: FIFTH: The effective date of the articles of entity conversion (if other than the date of filing) is
rationale: Optional future effective date; if blank, filing date applies. Same shape as merger.future_effective_date on MBCA-10.

label_verbatim: *By ___ (signature of an officer or other duly authorized representative) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined name+capacity widget. Shape D (matches MBCA-11 / MLLC-12 / MBCA-12). Form footnote allows 'an officer or other duly authorized representative' per 13-C MRSA §955.1.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
rationale: Cover-letter row 2 (likely populated with the bundled MLLC-6 / MLPA-6 entity).

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up

label_verbatim: Contact email address for this filing

label_verbatim: Email address to use for annual report reminders
rationale: Annual-report reminder email (applies to surviving entity post-conversion).
